posts.text: Hi All - Surprised that has been no conference call or investor presentation. This looks worrying.

posts.author: Abhijith_Vutukuru
posts.community: Ceinsys Tech-Engineering, Geospatial & IT solutions Company
posts.text: Any update about Q4Fy26 concall and current Order book? It seem’s like they haven’t released investor presentation also?

posts.author: anjeshv4
posts.community: Ceinsys Tech-Engineering, Geospatial & IT solutions Company
posts.text: Jal Jeevan Mission funds were blocked for more than a year. Consequently, receivables ballooned for a lot of companies. Now, with the audit of the Mission completed & the Mission back on track, hopefully this issue gets mitigated in the coming quarters. To add to this, promoters are a BJP linked family. With two of the promoters being the wife and son of a reputable MLA. So I have less concern over the receivables ballooning beyond a point.
